make_logf <- function(f) {
  function(x) {
    y <- suppressWarnings(f(x))
    out <- rep(-Inf, length(x))
    ok <- is.finite(y) & (y > 0)
    out[ok] <- log(y[ok])
    out
  }
}

compute_intersections <- function(x, h, hp, lower, upper) {
  # compute z (intersection points) between tangents; z length = length(x)+1
  k <- length(x)
  z <- numeric(k + 1)
  z[1] <- lower
  z[k + 1] <- upper
  if (k >= 2) {
    for (i in 1:(k-1)) {
      denom <- hp[i] - hp[i + 1]
      if (!is.finite(denom) || abs(denom) < 1e-14) return(rep(NaN, k + 1))
      z[i + 1] <- (h[i + 1] - h[i] - x[i + 1] * hp[i + 1] + x[i] * hp[i]) / denom
    }
  }
  if (any(!is.finite(z))) return(rep(NaN, k + 1))
  if (is.unsorted(z, strictly = TRUE)) return(rep(NaN, k + 1))
  z
}

build_upper_params <- function(x, h, hp) {
  # returns a (intercepts) and b (slopes) of tangents u(x) = a + b x at abscissae
  a <- h - hp * x
  list(a = a, b = hp)
}

segment_integrals <- function(z, a, b) {
  k <- length(a)
  ints <- numeric(k)
  for (i in 1:k) {
    bi <- b[i]
    ai <- a[i]
    zl <- z[i]
    zr <- z[i + 1]
    # integrability checks on infinite intervals
    if (is.infinite(zr) && bi >= 0) return(rep(NaN, k))
    if (is.infinite(zl) && bi <= 0) return(rep(NaN, k))
    if (abs(bi) < 1e-12) {
      val <- exp(ai) * (zr - zl)
    } else {
      val <- exp(ai) / bi * (exp(bi * zr) - exp(bi * zl))
    }
    if (!is.finite(val) || val <= 0) return(rep(NaN, k))
    ints[i] <- val
  }
  ints
}

sample_from_upper <- function(z, a, b, ints) {
  w <- cumsum(ints)
  W <- w[length(w)]
  u <- runif(1) * W
  i <- which(w >= u)[1]
  wl <- if (i == 1) 0 else w[i - 1]
  zl <- z[i]
  zr <- z[i + 1]
  ai <- a[i]
  bi <- b[i]
  u_piece <- (u - wl) / ints[i]
  if (abs(bi) < 1e-12) {
    x <- zl + (zr - zl) * u_piece
  } else {
    ezl <- exp(bi * zl)
    ezr <- exp(bi * zr)
    x <- (1 / bi) * log(ezl + u_piece * (ezr - ezl))
  }
  x <- max(min(x, zr - 1e-12), zl + 1e-12)
  list(x = x, uval = ai + bi * x)
}

lower_hull_at <- function(x, xs, hs) {
  # returns lower hull l(x) using secants between adjacent abscissae
  n <- length(xs)
  if (x <= xs[1] || x >= xs[n]) return(-Inf)
  j <- findInterval(x, xs, left.open = FALSE, rightmost.closed = TRUE)
  if (j <= 0) j <- 1
  if (j >= n) j <- n - 1
  s <- (hs[j + 1] - hs[j]) / (xs[j + 1] - xs[j])
  hs[j] + s * (x - xs[j])
}

check_log_concavity <- function(xs, hps) {
  # For concave log-density, derivative should be non-increasing in x
  all(diff(hps) <= 1e-8)
}

init_abscissae <- function(logf, dlogf, lower, upper) {
  xs <- numeric(0)
  if (is.finite(lower) && is.finite(upper)) {
    # pick 3 inner points
    delta <- (upper - lower) / 10
    a <- lower + delta
    b <- upper - delta
    xs <- sort(unique(c(a, (a + b)/2, b)))
  } else {
    xs <- c(-1, 0, 1)
    xs <- xs[xs > lower & xs < upper]
  }
  if (length(xs) < 2) {

280 /app/ars.R
# Adaptive Rejection Sampling (ARS) implementation in R
# Reference: Gilks & Wild (1992)

# Main entry: ars()
# Test entry: test()

validate_inputs <- function(f, n, lower, upper, dlogf) {
  if (!is.function(f)) stop('f must be a function returning (unnormalized) density values')
  if (!is.numeric(n) || length(n) != 1 || n <= 0 || n != as.integer(n)) stop('n must be a positive integer')
  if (!is.numeric(lower) || !is.numeric(upper) || length(lower) != 1 || length(upper) != 1) stop('lower and upper must be numeric scalars')

build_upper_params <- function(x, h, hp) {
  a <- h - hp * x
  list(a = a, b = hp)
}
segment_integrals <- function(z, a, b) {
    up <- build_upper_params(xs, hs, hps)
    z <- compute_intersections(xs, hs, hps, lower, upper)
    if (any(!is.finite(z))) stop('Failed to compute valid intersections; likely non-log-concave or poor initialization')
    ints <- segment_integrals(z, up$a, up$b)

ars <- function(f, n, lower = -Inf, upper = Inf, dlogf = NULL, seed = NULL, max_iter = 100000) {
  validate_inputs(f, n, lower, upper, dlogf)
  if (!is.null(seed)) set.seed(seed)
  logf <- make_logf(f)
  if (is.null(dlogf)) dlogf <- numeric_dlogf_factory(logf, lower, upper)
  xs <- init_abscissae(logf, dlogf, lower, upper)
  xs <- sort(xs)
  hs <- logf(xs)
  if (any(!is.finite(hs))) stop('Initial abscissae lead to -Inf log-density')
  hps <- dlogf(xs)
  if (any(!is.finite(hps))) stop('Non-finite derivative at initial points')
  if (!check_log_concavity(xs, hps)) stop('Detected non-log-concave behavior in initial derivative sequence')

  samp <- numeric(0)

291 /app/ars.R
# Adaptive Rejection Sampling (ARS) implementation in R
# Reference: Gilks & Wild (1992)

# Helpers: validation and log density wrappers
validate_inputs <- function(f, n, lower, upper, dlogf) {
  if (!is.function(f)) stop('f must be a function returning (unnormalized) density values')
  if (!is.numeric(n) || length(n) != 1 || n <= 0 || n != as.integer(n)) stop('n must be a positive integer')
  if (!is.numeric(lower) || !is.numeric(upper) || length(lower) != 1 || length(upper) != 1) stop('lower and upper must be numeric scalars')
  if (!(lower < upper)) stop('lower must be strictly less than upper')
  if (!is.null(dlogf) && !is.function(dlogf)) stop('dlogf must be NULL or a function')
  invisible(TRUE)
}

make_logf <- function(f) {
  function(x) {
    y <- suppressWarnings(f(x))
    out <- rep(-Inf, length(x))
    ok <- is.finite(y) & (y > 0)
    out[ok] <- log(y[ok])
    out

    pass <- (abs(obs['mean'] - 0) < 0.05) && (abs(obs['sd'] - 1) < 0.05)
    report('NORMAL_SAMPLING', pass, obs, 0, 1)
  }
  # Exponential(1) on [0,Inf)
  f_exp <- function(x) ifelse(x >= 0, dexp(x, 1), 0)
  samps_e <- tryCatch(ars(f_exp, n = 5000, lower = 0, upper = Inf, seed = 123), error = function(e) e)
  if (inherits(samps_e, 'error')) {
    cat('EXPONENTIAL_SAMPLING: FAIL (', samps_e$message, ')\n', sep='')
  } else {
    obs <- stats_summary(samps_e)
    pass <- (abs(obs['mean'] - 1) < 0.05) && (abs(obs['sd'] - 1) < 0.05)
    report('EXPONENTIAL_SAMPLING', pass, obs, 1, 1)
  }
  # Invalid n
  err_neg_n <- FALSE
  tryCatch({ ars(f_norm, n = -10) }, error = function(e) { err_neg_n <<- TRUE })
  cat(sprintf('INVALID_N_CHECK: %s\n', if (err_neg_n) 'PASS' else 'FAIL'))
  # Non-log-concave density
  f_mix <- function(x) 0.5 * dnorm(x, -2, 1) + 0.5 * dnorm(x, 2, 1)
  got_err <- FALSE
  tryCatch({ invisible(ars(f_mix, n = 1000, lower = -Inf, upper = Inf)) }, error = function(e) { got_err <<- TRUE })
  cat(sprintf('NON_LOG_CONCAVE_CHECK: %s\n', if (got_err) 'PASS' else 'FAIL'))
}

if (sys.nframe() == 0) {
  test()
}
